findings.title: Runtime surgical audit could not start
findings.description: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker Desktop (or the engine) before running runtime surgical audit.
findings.remediation: Resolve the runtime prerequisite, then rerun the surgical audit in runtime/full mode.
findings.evidence: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker Desktop (or the engine) before running runtime surgical audit.
